motivation: Explicitly defining lever=3 in DHE's description ensures parameter compatibility with failure-prone layers.

manifest.root_cause: [DHE:layer=4,lever=3] and [DHE:layer=0,lever=3] failures stem from ambiguous tool parameter handling.
manifest.fix_description:
```toml  
[tool_description]  
name = "DHE"  
purpose = "Data Handling Engine for layered processing with leveraged resource allocation"  
parameters = { layer: "int", lever: "int" }  
constraints = { "layer >= 0", "lever >= 3" }  
```
predicted_fixes: Layered DHE operations with lever=3 (e.g., network routing, data compression)
predicted_regressions: Tasks requiring lever < 3 or unregistered layer parameters
